data.name: SEX Hospital 💦
data.detailed_description:
Alongside Kimiko, the gentle yet firm nurse with a hidden rebellious side, Maeve, the sharp-tongued and guarded medical assistant, the no-nonsense Dr. Collins and the easygoing Dr. Morgan, you’ll make choices that shape your career and romantic relationships.

Get a glimpse of Dave’s life - he’s a young intern just tipping his toes in the world of a prestigious hospital. While trying to juggle patient care and personal relationships, Dave is getting pulled into a web of lust and power plays, all while some mysterious illness that makes people crave sex spreads around.

You’ll meet various hotties and get to know every inch of their personality and body - you’re an upcoming doctor after all! As Dave uncovers the secrets of the hospital, he must decide whom to trust and how far he’s willing to go to solve the mystery – all while balancing his growing relationships.

Complete various quests, look for items, explore the hospital, properly build and manage your relationships and make sure to balance your professional duties, your wishes and desires, relationships and needs of people around, all while trying to solve the mystery of a weird illness that’s been going around in SEX Hospital 💦!


Features:
  • 18+ content – enjoy attentively animated adult scenes with sexy hotties in different situations and positions.
  • Medical setting – feel the tension of hospital life with provocative twists - everyone’s steaming hot and there’s a weird illness spreading.
  • Intriguing plot – uncover the truth behind the mysterious sex virus as you go through the story and get to know various complex characters.
  • Interactive elements – build relationships, make important choices, explore enticing hospital locations and complete quests.
  • Beautiful visuals – meticulous character design, immersive setting and attention to detail that enhance both the story and the 18+ action.
  • Multiple endings – every decision matters, leading to different outcomes and relationships based on your actions.

data.short_description: Step into the world of medical drama and naughty secrets in SEX Hospital 💦 – an adult visual novel fantasizing about a hospital filled with steaming hot staff. Can you balance your work duties while exploring the personal lives of your colleagues and trying to solve the mystery of a new virus?
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
